name: Mike Akins
bio: Mike Akins serves as the Mayor of Hallsville, a growing community in Harrison County located between Longview and Marshall. Hallsville is known for its excellent school district and small-town values. The mayor works with the city council to manage growth and maintain quality city services.
campaignPromises: Manage growth while preserving Hallsville's character
Support Hallsville ISD and local education
Maintain low taxes and efficient city services
Enhance parks and community gathering spaces
